title: TodoEvent
description: CloudEvent published to the events role (the Cloudflare Queue 'todo-events') whenever the todo domain mutates a todo. One snapshot schema with a `type` discriminant covers create, update, complete and delete. The authoritative copy of this schema also lives inline in domain/contracts/api/todo-service.asyncapi.yaml.

data.description: Snapshot of the todo at mutation time. `title` is transport-only — the data-product consumer strips it before landing the analytical layer. `channel`/`is_test` are the analytics dimensions both data products keep.

user_id.description: The owning user — the Cloudflare Access `sub` claim.

channel.description: The experience the mutation came from (X-Channel header; unrecognised/absent → "api").

is_test.description: Whether the caller declared this test traffic (X-Test header).
